title: CURVER Knit Effect Kitchen, Living room, Bathroom, Bedroom, Utility Large Rectangular Storage Baskets 19 Litres - White
features: A stylish storage solution for your bathroom, kitchen, Living room, office or study areas
Exclusive Knit design with comfortable handles, flat inner surface and can be easily stacked
Durable, lightweight and easy to clean with a 19 Litre capacity
External Dimensions: 40 x 28 x 23 cm (L x W x H)
Made in the UK and Europe
description: From the manufacturer Curver Knit Rectangular Storage Basket, Oasis White, 19 Litre Curver’s Knit range is inspired by the art and nostalgia of knitted textiles. Made from durable, long lasting resin with a natural open weave knit pattern, the Knit range is practical and stylish. The Knit large rectangular 19 litre storage basket is multi functional and can be used for neatly storing all larger products around your home. In your bedroom, bathroom or your office you can be sure that wherever you have items to store, this versatile basket has the storage solution that you are looking for keeping all of your possessions neat, tidy and accessible. It comes with easy to grab handles, is easy to clean and will stay looking good for years. Curver Knit Key Features Exclusive Knit Design Comfortable Handles Stackable/Nestable Available in Single or 5 Pack Ideal storage solutions for anywhere in your home Bathroom In your bathroom, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising your towels, toiletries and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Kitchen In your kitchen, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising all of your spices, accessories,and utensils keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Living Room In your living area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your magazines, blankets and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Office or Study In your office or study area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your all of your pens, notepads and books keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish.
